---
title: "Cooperative Game Theory"
description: "Shapley value, core, nucleolus, coalition formation, cost allocation, and bargaining solutions."
listing:
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  fields: [title, description, date, categories]
---

::: {.topic-card-label}
90 TUTORIALS
:::

# Cooperative Game Theory

Shapley value, core, nucleolus, coalition formation, cost allocation, and bargaining solutions.
